class.name: NavigationMeshArea3D
class.brief_description: An area shape to affect navigation mesh geometry upon baking.
class.description: An area that draws its shape onto the [NavigationMesh] geometry during baking with the goal to overwrite the default navigation layers (see [member NavigationRegion3D.navigation_layers]). [NavigationMeshArea3D] is the base the different area shapes. It cannot be used directly. [b]Note:[/b] To guarantee that the area affects the intended [NavigationMesh], make sure that 1. the area's bounds must intersect with the source geometry, and 2. the [member navigation_layers] are different from the [NavigationRegion3D] you intend to bake with. [b]Note:[/b]: Rotation is limited to the y-axis. Scaling should be done uniformly, if at all.f

method.name: get_bounds
method.description: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box for the area's transformed shape.

method.name: get_navigation_layer_value
method.description: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member navigation_layers] bitmask is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

method.name: set_navigation_layer_value
method.description: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member navigation_layers] bitmask, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.member: The priority of the area during the baking process. If multiple areas overlap for the same polygons the area with the highest [member bake_priority] wins. [b]Note:[/b] This affects the baking of the [NavigationMesh] only, not queries.
Determines if the [NavigationMeshArea3D] is enabled or disabled. Requires a navigation mesh rebake to take any real effect.

Each navigation region has default [member NavigationRegion3D.navigation_layers]. This bitfield allows overwriting layers for the polygons that are part of this area during the baking process. [b]Note:[/b] Changing this value at runtime requires baking the affected regions. For changes during runtime without having to bake the regions again, see [method NavigationRegion3D.set_area_navigation_layers].
